title: Create `DapTransportService` Abstract Interface
description: Define a unified communication abstraction layer per spec [Â§4](system-specification.md#4-communication-architecture)
details: Define abstract class / interface `DapTransportService`
Methods: `connect()`, `disconnect()`, `sendRequest()`, `onEvent()` (Observable)
Define DAP Message base types (`DapRequest`, `DapResponse`, `DapEvent`)

title: Implement WebSocket Transport Layer (`WebSocketTransportService`)
description: Implement Web mode WebSocket communication per spec [Â§4.2](system-specification.md#42-web-browser-mode)
details: Implement `DapTransportService`'s WebSocket version
WebSocket connection/disconnection management
DAP message serialization/deserialization (Content-Length header + JSON body)
Use RxJS Subject to emit received events
[Test] Header parsing: Packets split by `Content-Length` handled via buffer
[Test] Sticky/half packet handling: TCP fragmented packets handled via buffer
[Test] Fail-Fast & Error Isolation: malformed packets handling
[Test] Buffer Auto-expansion: verified expansion on large payloads

title: DAP Session Management Service (`DapSessionService`)
description: Encapsulate the DAP protocol's request/response lifecycle
details: `initialize()` â†’ Exchange Capabilities
`launch()` / `attach()` â†’ Start debugging based on configuration
`configurationDone()` â†’ Notify DAP Server
`disconnect()` â†’ Terminate session
Manage request sequence ID and pending response mapping
[Test] Sequence ID management: Verify `seq` increments correctly

title: DAP Request Timeout Mechanism
description: Implement timeout mechanism for `DapSessionService` requests, preventing permanent waits when the server is unresponsive
details: Modify `sendRequest` method, add `setTimeout` wait limit (e.g., 5 seconds)
On timeout, clear pending handler and reject `Promise`
[Test] Promise Mapping: Verify `sendRequest` Promise resolves/rejects on response
[Test] Timeout mechanism: Simulate server non-response, verify timeout error

title: Integrate DapSessionService in DebuggerComponent
description: Actually invoke DapSessionService in DebuggerComponent to start and terminate debug sessions
details: Execute `initializeSession`, `launchOrAttach`, and `configurationDone` in `ngOnInit`
Call `disconnect` on `ngOnDestroy` and `goBack` to clear session and connection
Subscribe to `onEvent()` to log base events to UI in real-time
Use `try/catch` to capture timeout errors and display friendly notifications in UI (e.g., `MatSnackBar` or `dapLogs`)

title: DAP 'terminated' Event _restart Payload Passing
description: Support context-aware session restart by forwarding the custom _restart field.
details: Update the DapSessionService to capture the _restart field
Ensure disconnect() cycle cleans up stale RxJS subscriptions
Modify startSession() initialization sequence to accept and merge this cached _restart data
